name: Poseidon
short_description: Poseidon wants to return his beloved golden sharks back to the Greek seas, go to a small island and help God find his subjects!)
detailed_description:
Poseidon wants to return his beloved golden sharks back to the Greek seas, go to a small island and help God find his subjects!)
A relax game in which you have to find 30 golden sharks hidden on the island and underwater in order to return them to Poseidon.
Peculiarities:
-Genre: Simulator - search of hidden objects
-Open world (small island and underwater world)
-Relaxing soundtrack
-Simple, relax gameplay - walk and look for golden sharks, they can be anywhere on the map.
-Theme: Ancient Greece and nice graphics
